summary: Comprehensive testing of BatchDetail.js redesign - two-column layout, pH badge, compact info row, quality bar, stage cards, rejection summary, activity log, inspection form, move/receive form, and warehouse transfer. All 14 features verified successfully.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test batches: 660G-APR-001 (rich rejection data, pH 8.5), TEST-FIX-001 (pending items, pH 7.5), 20L-APR-004 (created status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BatchDetail.js redesign complete. All features working: two-column layout (stages left, rejections right), pH badge as inline color-coded badge, compact info chips, overall quality bar, stage cards with RECV/PEND/PASS/REJ + percentages, rejection summary with By Resource/By Reason breakdowns, expandable detail view with filters, activity log collapsible, inspection form inline, move/receive form, warehouse transfer section, delete button for created status only.

two_column_layout.details: Stages on left (lg:col-span-7), rejection summary + activity on right (lg:col-span-5)

ph_badge.details: Subtle inline badge next to batch code with color dot. pH 8.5 shows blue, pH 7.5 shows sky color

compact_info_row.details: Date, crates, b/c, bottles displayed as small chips with icons

overall_quality_bar.details: Slim bar showing pass% (green), reject% (red), counts. 660G-APR-001: 92.3% pass, 7.7% rej

stage_cards_balance_row.details: Compact horizontal balance row with RECV/PEND/PASS/REJ + percentages

stage_cards_quality_microbar.details: Green/red micro-bar under balance when there are rejections

rejection_summary_right_side.details: By Resource and By Reason breakdowns with progress bars and counts

rejection_detail_view.details: Expandable with filters (Resource, Reason, Stage, Date) and table showing all rejection records

activity_log_collapsible.details: Shows movement and inspection entries with timestamps, collapsible

inspection_form_inline.details: Opens inline within stage card with Resource, Date, Crates fields, rejection rows, Submit/Cancel

move_receive_form.details: Shows source label, available quantity, Crates input, Notes, Move/Cancel buttons

warehouse_transfer_section.details: Shows available bottles, warehouse dropdown, quantity input, transfer history table

delete_batch_button.details: Visible only for batches with 'created' status (verified on 20L-APR-004)

submit_inspection_with_rejection.details: Inspection form has rejection fields with qty and reason dropdown, submit button works

ui_verification_screenshots: .screenshots/batch_detail_660g.png - Two-column layout, pH badge, quality bar, stage cards
.screenshots/batch_test_fix_001.png - Batch with pending items, inspect button visible
.screenshots/inspection_form_open.png - Inline inspection form with entry card
.screenshots/rejection_detail_view.png - Expanded rejection detail with filters and table
.screenshots/activity_log_expanded.png - Activity log showing movements and inspections
.screenshots/batch_created_status.png - Delete button visible for created status
.screenshots/warehouse_transfer_form.png - Warehouse transfer form with dropdown and history
